description: §14.4/§18.7 E-TYPE-082 — `fail MyError.NotFound()` names a VALID variant but supplies ZERO arguments to a variant that declares ONE payload field (`id`). Too-few is the mirror of the too-many `let` case; the fail locus routes through the shared construction-arity check. The variant name is valid (E-ERROR-009 does NOT fire). Incidental W-DEAD-FUNCTION/W-PROGRAM-001 ignored by superset matching.
rationale: §14.4: all declared payload fields MUST be bound at construction (there is no partial positional construction); too few arguments SHALL be a compile error (E-TYPE-082).
